step0.subtitle: by Vericore
step0.title: Welcome to VisaClear
step0.heading: Your visa approval starts here.
step0.body: VisaClear is the bridge between you and a successful application — giving you the exact documents to prepare, connecting you with verified agents when you need one, and making sure nothing gets missed along the way.
step1.heading: Three steps to a stronger application.
step1.p1.label: Choose your route
step1.p1.desc: Select your home country and destination. We know the exact requirements for your corridor.
step1.p2.label: Get your checklist
step1.p2.desc: Every document named precisely — what it is, where to get it, and what embassies actually look for.
step1.p3.label: Apply with confidence
step1.p3.desc: Know exactly what embassies look for, track every step of your preparation, and set deadline reminders so nothing falls through the cracks.
step2.heading: It's all about Privacy.
step2.body: Your data is never sold. Never shared with third parties. Built with GDPR and NDPA principles by a CISA-certified compliance professional. Your refusal letter text and personal documents are processed securely and stay yours.
step2.terms_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our
step2.disclaimer: VisaClear is a guidance tool, not legal advice.
